title: Universal Health (UHS) Q4 Earnings Beat on Higher Patient Days
text: Universal Health Services (UHS) expects capital expenditures for 2022 to increase from the 2021 level to the range of $950-$1,100 million.

title: Universal Health (UHS) to Post Q4 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Universal Health Services' (UHS) fourth-quarter results are likely to reflect the benefits of improving patient volumes.

title: UNIVERSAL HEALTH SERVICES, INC. ANNOUNCES DATE FOR 2021 FOURTH QUARTER AND FULL YEAR EARNINGS RELEASE AND CONFERENCE CALL
text: KING OF PRUSSIA, Pa., Feb. 8, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Universal Health Services, Inc. (NYSE: UHS) announced today that it will report results for its fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2021 after the market closes on Thursday, February 24, 2022.

title: Top 3 Healthcare REITs For 2022
text: The healthcare property sector is vast and versatile, with many different sub-segments. Senior housing and skilled nursing properties continue to suffer great pain, but medical office buildings and hospitals are doing just fine.
